title: Ubiquiti UACC-Lock-Strike-Safe-8mm, Electric fail-safe strike lock
description: The UACC-Lock-Strike-Safe-8mm is an electric strike lock that connects to a UniFi Access Hub . The lock is fail-safe, unlocking in the event of failure . It can be installed in wooden, steel, and aluminum frames. The device features a built-in DPS (door position sensor), allowing monitoring of the door open/closed status, and has a holding force of up to 227 kg . Power is supplied via a two-wire terminal block 12V/200mA UA-Hub-Door UA-Hub-Door-Mini UA-Hub-Gate EAH-8 UA-Ultra
specsSearch: Power Power type DC terminal Max. power consumption [W] 2,4 Power via connector/terminal 12V DC
